common_diseases.description: Mosquito-borne viral infection endemic across Nepalese plains and urban valleys during post-monsoon.
symptoms: Severe muscle and joint aches (breakbone fever)
local_context_symptoms: हड्डी घोटिएको जस्तो मांसपेशी दुख्ने (Breakbone body pain)

common_diseases.description: Bacterial disease transmitted by chigger mites, prevalent during agricultural and harvest seasons.
symptoms: Eschar (black scab-like lesion at mite bite site)
local_context_symptoms: कालो खटिरा वा दाग (Eschar mark near groin/axilla)
काँपेर कडा ज्वरो आउने (Fever with chills)

common_diseases.description: Systemic infection caused by Salmonella Typhi, often due to water contamination in urban/rural areas.
local_context_symptoms: जिब्रोमा सेतो लेदो जम्रेको (Coated white tongue)
दिनप्रतिदिन ज्वरो बढ्दै जाने (Step-ladder fever pattern)

common_diseases.description: High prevalence in rural Nepal due to indoor biomass fuel smoke (chula) and urban air pollution.
local_context_symptoms: दाउराको धूवाँले गर्दा सास फेर्न गाह्रो हुने (Breathing difficulty from biomass smoke)
छातीबाट सिट्टी बजेजस्तो आवाज आउने (Wheezing noise)

common_diseases.description: Airborne bacterial infection remain high priority in public health throughout Nepal.
local_context_symptoms: दुई हप्ताभन्दा बढी खकार आउने खोकी (Cough >2 weeks)
राति पसिना आउने र बेलुका ज्वरो आउने (Night sweats & evening fever)

common_diseases.description: Frequent outbreaks during monsoon seasons due to water supply contamination.
symptoms: Signs of dehydration (sunken eyes, dry mouth, poor skin turgor)
local_context_symptoms: चामल धोएको जस्तो सेतो पखाला (Rice-water diarrhea)
आँखा गढ्ने र पिसाब रोकिने (Sunken eyes & reduced urine)

common_diseases.description: Fecal-oral transmission via contaminated drinking water; poses extreme risk to pregnant women.
local_context_symptoms: आँखा र छाला पहेंलो हुने (Yellowing of eyes)
कडा चिया जस्तो गाढा पिसाब (Dark tea-colored urine)

common_diseases.description: Life-threatening altitude sickness triggered above 2,500m-3,000m during trekking or pilgrimage.
symptoms: Severe throbbing headache non-responsive to paracetamol
local_context_symptoms: हिँड्दा ढल्किने वा सन्तुलन गुम्ने (Loss of physical balance while walking)
लेक लागेर गुलाबी फिँजयुक्त खकार आउने (Pink frothy sputum at high altitude)

extreme_test_cases_for_judges.title: Atypical Scrub Typhus vs. Meningitis Presentation
reported_symptoms: Small black eschar mark hidden near groin region
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.diagnostic_challenge: Symptoms mimic pyogenic meningitis or encephalitis due to neurological alteration. Misrouting to Neurology without checking for vector-borne eschar can delay critical Doxycycline administration.
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.recommended_action: High-priority triage: Route to Infectious Diseases or ER immediately due to signs of systemic infection with CNS involvement.

extreme_test_cases_for_judges.title: Atypical Dengue Manifesting as Acute Abdomen
reported_symptoms: Sudden high fever resolving on day 4
Severe continuous right-upper quadrant abdominal pain
Extreme fatigue and cold clammy extremities
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.diagnostic_challenge: Often misidentified as acute appendicitis or acute cholecystitis (Surgical Gastroenterology). However, this marks the critical capillary leak phase of Severe Dengue Hemorrhagic Fever.
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.recommended_action: Critical Emergency Warning: Flag plasma leakage phase of Severe Dengue. Immediate fluid management in ER required.

extreme_test_cases_for_judges.title: Severe Altitude Sickness (HACE) Mimicking Acute Stroke
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.diagnostic_challenge: Looks like an acute ischemic stroke (Neurology). At high altitude, this pattern points directly to High Altitude Cerebral Edema (HACE).
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.recommended_action: Emergency Altitude Protocol: Primary trigger must order immediate descent/oxygen therapy alongside referral to High-Altitude Medicine.

extreme_test_cases_for_judges.title: Fulminant Hepatitis E in Pregnancy
reported_symptoms: Progressive yellowish discoloration of eyes for 3 days
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.diagnostic_challenge: Presents as routine gastroenterology/jaundice issue, but Hepatitis E in 3rd-trimester pregnancy carries high mortality from Acute Liver Failure.
extreme_test_cases_for_judges.recommended_action: High-Risk Multi-Specialty Flag: Alert both Hepatology and Obstetrics for rapid triage to prevent acute hepatic necrosis.
